design_philosophy: Color is function only. 95% of the UI is monochrome, structured via rigid grids. Accent colors are strictly reserved for guiding critical actions (Record, Generate, Export). Asymmetry creates tension, while strict alignment maintains order.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout_and_spacing.spacing_philosophy: Dense and compact for data, generous padding inside containers. Never center by default.
layout_and_spacing.paddings: p-6 or p-8 for main cards, p-4 for nested elements
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strictly left-aligned. Optical alignment for icons and text.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: GRID BORDERS - Container uses border-collapse. Items have border-r border-b border-border/40. No rounded corners (rounded-none).
surface_strategies.code_editor_block: RETRO-FUTURISM - Deep black background (#000000), 1px solid border, subtle monospace typography, syntax highlighting tailored to Jenkins (red/blue/amber keywords).
surface_strategies.floating_nav: GLASSMORPHISM - bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and backdrop-saturate-150. 1px bottom border border-white/10.

buttons.primary: rounded-none bg-primary text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-xs px-6 py-3 hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors
buttons.record_action: rounded-none bg-accent_record text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 hover:bg-red-600 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,59,48,0.5)]
buttons.ghost: rounded-none bg-transparent text-text_secondary border border-border hover:border-white hover:text-white transition-all

inputs.text: rounded-none bg-surface border border-border px-4 py-2 text-white focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white transition-all
inputs.select: Shadcn custom select - stripped of border-radius, harsh contrasting borders.

components.tables_lists: Row items separated by 1px solid #27272A. Hover states invert the background slightly (bg-white/5).
components.modals: Solid background (no glass for technical data), harsh 1px white border, drop-shadow-2xl.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard cuts or fast transitions (0.15s ease-out). Items snap to active states.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast 2px solid white outline. No soft blue rings.
motion_and_interactions.loaders: ASCII art spinners or harsh geometric loaders (no soft circular spinners).

icons_and_assets.icon_library: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - strict geometric and technical feel. Weight: bold or duotone.

image_urls.description: Abstract precise grid architecture. Use as a low-opacity background for the empty state of the documentation viewer to break up the solid black canvas.
Intricate abstract architectural image with intersecting geometric lines. Perfect for a split-screen login/auth page or loading screen.

specific_feature_guidelines.screen_capture_module: Must feature a sticky or floating 'Command Center' bar. The Record button must stand out using the accent_record color. When recording is active, use a pulsating border.
specific_feature_guidelines.ai_generation_panel: Use the accent_ai (Yellow) for the 'Generate' action. Display a terminal-like streaming text effect while Claude/Gemini is generating the docs.
specific_feature_guidelines.jenkins_syntax: Custom syntax highlighting block. Keywords (pipeline, agent, stages) in accent_ai or primary blue. Strings in green. Background pitch black.
specific_feature_guidelines.export_actions: Grouped in the top right. Monospace ghost buttons for PDF and Word.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Text over surfaces must maintain a 4.5:1 ratio minimum.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. Use kebab-case, role-based tags like data-testid='screen-capture-btn', data-testid='generate-docs-submit'.
